languages.text: {n}И снова — начало. Та же застава, те же голоса, те же слова, уже звучавшие прежде. Время здесь не течет — оно ходит по кругу. Чудовищная западня, расставленная коварными ксеносами.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Закрывается Obj1_WhatTheHells, стартует Obj1_Add_Timeloop и Obj2_AWayOut

traits.locale_text: {n}И снова — начало. Та же застава, те же голоса, те же слова, уже звучавшие прежде. Время здесь не течет — оно ходит по кругу. Чудовищная западня, расставленная коварными ксеносами.{/n}

languages.translation_comment: Закрывается Obj1_WhatTheHells, стартует Obj1_Add_Timeloop и Obj2_AWayOut

languages.text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}И снова — начало. Та же застава, те же голоса, те же слова, уже звучавшие прежде. Время здесь не течет — оно ходит по кругу. Чудовищная западня, расставленная коварными ксеносами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}
{n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}
{n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一切再次重启。还是那个前哨，还是那些声音，还是那些你已经听过的对话。时间在这里并不向前流动，而是在原地打转。这是狡猾异形设下的可怕陷阱。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一切再次重启。还是那个前哨，还是那些声音，还是那些你已经听过的对话。时间在这里并不向前流动，而是在原地打转。这是狡猾异形设下的可怕陷阱。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Et voilà que tout recommence une fois de plus. Le même avant-poste, les mêmes voix, les mêmes propos que vous avez déjà entendus. Ici, le temps ne s'écoule pas, il tourne en boucle, tel un piège monstrueux orchestré par de perfides xénos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Et voilà que tout recommence une fois de plus. Le même avant-poste, les mêmes voix, les mêmes propos que vous avez déjà entendus. Ici, le temps ne s'écoule pas, il tourne en boucle, tel un piège monstrueux orchestré par de perfides xénos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İşte yine o başlangıç. Aynı karakol, aynı sesler, daha önce duyduğun kelimelerin tıpatıp aynısı. Zaman burada akmıyor, daireler çizerek dönüp duruyor. Sinsi zenolar tarafından kurulmuş korkunç bir tuzak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İşte yine o başlangıç. Aynı karakol, aynı sesler, daha önce duyduğun kelimelerin tıpatıp aynısı. Zaman burada akmıyor, daireler çizerek dönüp duruyor. Sinsi zenolar tarafından kurulmuş korkunç bir tuzak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Y, una vez más, el principio. El mismo puesto avanzado, las mismas voces y las mismas palabras que ya has oído. El tiempo no fluye aquí, sino que da vueltas. Una trampa monstruosa tendida por xenos astutos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Y, una vez más, el principio. El mismo puesto avanzado, las mismas voces y las mismas palabras que ya has oído. El tiempo no fluye aquí, sino que da vueltas. Una trampa monstruosa tendida por xenos astutos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Und wieder von vorne. Derselbe Außenposten, dieselben Stimmen und dieselben Worte, die du bereits kennst. Anstatt zu fließen, verläuft die Zeit hier im Kreis. Eine monströse Falle teuflischer Xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Und wieder von vorne. Derselbe Außenposten, dieselben Stimmen und dieselben Worte, die du bereits kennst. Anstatt zu fließen, verläuft die Zeit hier im Kreis. Eine monströse Falle teuflischer Xenos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}そしてまた、始まり。同じ要塞、同じ声、同じ言葉。時間はこの場所で流れは無い。円を描くように繰り返す。狡猾な異種族が仕掛けた恐ろしい罠。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And again, the beginning. The same outpost, the same voices, the same words you have already heard. Time does not flow here, it runs in circles. A monstrous trap set by devious xenos.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}そしてまた、始まり。同じ要塞、同じ声、同じ言葉。時間はこの場所で流れは無い。円を描くように繰り返す。狡猾な異種族が仕掛けた恐ろしい罠。{/n}
